Every Tessera thermostat is covered by a two-year limited warranty against
manufacturing defects. The warranty covers the device itself, the wall plate,
and the included USB-C cable. It does not cover damage from drops, improper
wiring, power surges, or use with incompatible HVAC systems. Warranty claims
require the original order number; contact support@tessera.example to start
a claim. Approved warranty replacements ship free of charge.
